notes: Exceptional work. Agent correctly identified all 5,000 entries spanning Jun 9–Sep 14 2005; accurately reported top services (ftpd 1,655, sshd 1,610, kernel 545, su 394); identified 9 rpc.statd format-string exploit waves (CVE-2000-0666) with payload decoding (%8x…%hn, NOP sled, shellcode); analyzed 1,638 FTP connections with 155 sources and distinctive 23-per-second burst pattern; flagged 1,221 SSH authentication failures targeting root (840) and service accounts; ranked top 5 anomalies by severity with strong evidence. Report is well-structured markdown with tables, timelines, and recommendations. Minor deductions: (1) duplicate file created (`syslog_anomalies_1.md`), (2) some payload byte details not directly quoted from log, (3) BIND NOTIFY analysis lacks direct source-IP extraction (understandable given BIND 9.2.3 limitations). Meets all rubric criteria and exceeds expected findings.
